welcome.title: Shift Operations
welcome.description: Manage shift assignment to employees. The tabs show employees without shift, with active shift, future or past.

tabs.title: Tabs
tabs.description: Navigate between views: employees without shift, with active shift, future or past. Each tab shows the corresponding count.

infoBtn.title: System Information
infoBtn.description: View information about how the shift assignment module works.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Search employees by name, document number, job or branch. Use Search to apply filters.

toolbar.title: Main actions
toolbar.description: Clear resets filters. Search applies the search. Select Shift appears when employees are selected to assign them a shift.

table.title: Employees table
table.description: Select employees with the checkboxes. Use the 'Select Shift' button to continue with assignment.

pagination.title: Pagination
pagination.description: Navigate between pages and adjust the number of records displayed.

welcome.title: Shift Assignment
welcome.description: Configure the start date and schedules per employee. Select one or more employees from the left panel, choose the date and assign schedules to each day.

sidebar.title: Selected employees
sidebar.description: List of employees to be assigned. Use the search to filter. Click on an employee to configure their schedules.

headerConfig.title: General configuration
headerConfig.description: Enter the shift start date and review the selected shift. Use 'Compare' to see the schedule distribution between employees.

employeeConfig.title: Per-employee configuration
employeeConfig.description: For each employee: select a shift, the holiday rule and assign the schedule to each day of the cycle.

bottomBar.title: Summary and save
bottomBar.description: View elapsed time and progress. You must complete the configuration of all employees before saving.

submitBtn.title: Save assignment
submitBtn.description: Save the assignment when all employees are configured and marked as completed.
